name: Ferplast Natural Beige Collar C30/55
description: The FERPLAST Natural Beige Collar C30/55 is a premium leather dog collar, combining durability, comfort, and elegance. Designed for medium to large dogs, it offers secure fit, long-lasting wear, and a neutral beige color that complements any breed. Perfect for everyday use, this collar is available for fast delivery from local pet stores in Nairobi. Key Features & Benefits Premium Leather Material Made from high-quality natural leather for robustness and long-lasting use. Elegant Neutral Color Natural beige provides a stylish, understated look suitable for all dog breeds. Adjustable & Secure Fit Multiple special holes and a metal buckle allow easy adjustment for neck sizes 47–55 cm. Comfortable for Dogs Soft leather is gentle on the skin while providing sturdy support for active dogs. Durable & Reliable Resistant to daily wear and tear, ideal for medium to large dogs. Stylish Yet Functional Simple and elegant design, combining everyday practicality with aesthetic appeal. Availability in Nairobi Can be purchased online or in stores such as Carrefour Kenya, Pets Corner Nairobi, and Royal Pets Store, with fast local delivery options. Product Details Collar Width: 30 mm Neck Size: 47–55 cm Color: Natural Beige Material: Natural Leather Buckle: Metal Ideal For Owners of medium to large dogs who want a durable, comfortable, and stylish leather collar for everyday wear.
